etymology.description: чОЙ(чОЙ) (y├╣, "jade") + чОЙ(чОЙ) (y├╣, "jade") = two pieces of jade -> stylized as чПП
etymology.interpretation: The character чПП is composed of two jade pieces, symbolizing a pair or treasure of jades. This compound elementally signifies the richness and value of jade by duplicating its form.
